creator: vg@FreeBSD.org
text: I tried to work with custom configuration of pkgng parts cache/db and etc. Saltstack doesn't work with that because checks /var/db/pkg/local.sqlite. I changed /var/db/pkg/local.sqlite to /usr/local/etc/pkg.conf because pkg depended by pkg.conf and location of config usually default at the /usr/local/etc.
